automated_integration_testing_justificat: tests/multipeer/ runs 13 BDD scenarios driving two real Syncthing peers across a private Docker bridge on every PR. Required CI gate: .github/workflows/ci.yml job 'multipeer-e2e'. See ADR 0005 and docs/architecture.md.
regression_tests_added50_justification: Every fix in the v0.7.0 cycle shipped with a pinning test: PR #7 added TestConcurrentTrackUntrack as the state.toml race reproducer; PR #8 added TestWriteFileAtomic_* for atomic write semantics; PR #11 added TestConfigCheckCorrupt*HintsRecovery; PR #12 added TestWriteFileAtomic_TempNameMatchesSyncthingIgnore; PR #13 added the cross-compile CI gate. Test-for-every-fix is policy, not exception.
test_statement_coverage80_justification: Internal packages report between 75% and 88% statement coverage via 'go test -race -coverprofile' on every PR (CI artifact 'coverage-${run_id}'). config 87.9%, gitsync 88.2%, stclient 87.9%; reconcile 81.4%; doctor 81.5%. The race detector is enabled on the same step so concurrent-write bugs surface in CI.
test_policy_mandated_justification: CONTRIBUTING.md mandates: golangci-lint clean, 'go test -race' green, and (for cross-machine sync code) the multipeer-e2e job. Branch protection on main requires all five status checks: build, lint, multipeer-e2e, fuzz-smoke, Analyze (go). No exceptions; admins included.
static_analysis_justification: golangci-lint v2.11.4 pinned in .github/workflows/ci.yml as a hard CI gate. CodeQL Go analysis runs via .github/workflows/codeql.yml on every PR and weekly on schedule. Both findings block merge.
dynamic_analysis_justification: Go data-race detector ('go test -race') runs against the full test suite on every PR, including the multipeer e2e suite. .github/workflows/ci.yml job 'fuzz-smoke' runs each declared Go fuzz target (3 currently) for 20s per PR.
dynamic_analysis_unsafe_justification: The Go race detector instrument memory accesses for data races; fuzz targets exercise the TOML config parser at file boundaries. These two layers cover the most common unsafe-state classes for this codebase (concurrent shared state + untrusted input parsing).
documentation_architecture_justification: docs/architecture.md is the readable narrative; 5 ADRs (docs/adr/0001-…0005-…) document each load-bearing decision. ADR 0005 specifically covers the atomic-write + flock locking architecture introduced in v0.7.0.
documentation_security_justification: SECURITY.md describes the vulnerability disclosure process via GitHub Security Advisories (https://github.com/julian-corbet/dotkeeper/security/advisories/new), the 30-day acknowledgement window, and the credit policy for reporters.
documentation_quick_start_justification: README.md opens with install + quick-start sections covering the four distribution paths (GitHub Releases binaries, Homebrew, AUR, Docker via docker-compose.yml). Per-platform service-setup instructions linked from the README.
documentation_current_justification: CHANGELOG.md follows Keep-a-Changelog v1.1.0 and lists every notable change through v0.7.0 (2026-05-15) with Security/Fixed/Added/Changed sections. ADRs through 0005 cover the current architecture.
code_of_conduct_justification: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md is the Contributor Covenant 2.1, in force since 2026-05-13.
roles_responsibilities_justification: CODEOWNERS specifies the maintainer for every directory; SECURITY.md names the disclosure channel; CONTRIBUTING.md describes the PR-review path.
installation_common_justification: Five install paths covering the common platforms: GitHub Releases (multi-arch deb/rpm/apk/pkg.tar.zst + tar.gz for Linux/BSD/Darwin + zip for Windows; signed checksums); Homebrew tap (homebrew-dotkeeper); AUR package (dotkeeper); Docker image at ghcr.io/julian-corbet/dotkeeper (published from release.yml + docker.yml on every release tag); Nix flake (dotkeeper-src input of flakes-corbet-ch).
vulnerability_response_process_justifica: SECURITY.md commits to a 30-day acknowledgement window via GitHub Security Advisories. Dependabot vulnerability alerts and automated security-fix PRs are enabled on the public repo as of 2026-05-14.
vulnerability_report_credit_justificatio: SECURITY.md states reporters are credited in the relevant CHANGELOG entry unless they request anonymity.
crypto_used_network_justification: All cross-machine sync traffic flows through embedded Syncthing, which uses TLS for every peer-to-peer connection. dotkeeper does not implement its own network protocol.
crypto_tls12_justification: Embedded Syncthing requires TLS 1.3 (Syncthing has deprecated everything below TLS 1.3 since v1.0). dotkeeper inherits this; no TLS-version configuration is exposed.
crypto_certificate_verification_justific: Embedded Syncthing uses self-signed device certificates; the device ID IS the certificate hash. Pairing requires explicit mutual device-ID exchange (dotkeeper peer add). Connections to an unrecognised peer are rejected.
dependency_monitoring_justification: Dependabot runs daily across Go modules, GitHub Actions, and Docker base images (.github/dependabot.yml). govulncheck runs on every PR via .github/workflows/ci.yml as a reachability-aware CVE scan. Dependabot vulnerability alerts and auto-security-fixes are enabled on the public repo.
name: dotkeeper
